def test_provider_compiles():
        """Priority 1: Run 'go build' to ensure the generated provider is valid Go code."""
        # First run go mod tidy
        tidy_result = subprocess.run(
            ["go", "mod", "tidy"],
            cwd=TERRAFORM_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
